positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~spills_food(peter)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~cleanly(peter)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~tidy(X0) | ~spills_food(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~cleanly(X0) | tidy(X0)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~tidy(peter)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define clumsy_foodie(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define frequent_visitor(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define value_order(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define family_prioritizes_order(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
